title: YTP - The Lion Kingas
description:
You know how we furries love our Lion King, so I figured I'd make this. I'd been wanting to mess with this source for a while, but I only found the first 10 minutes in HQ. This is what I managed to make out of that. :P

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
